title: BlackboardResourceRecord
description: R1 record for the Blackboard MCP resource (res-blackboard-mcp-001). R1 = snapshot and audit only. MCP status is disabled. Server execution is forbidden. All state, events, and knowledge access is read-only. No mutating bb_* tools allowed.

record_id.description: Unique record identifier for this R1 Blackboard resource record.

phase.description: The integration phase. MUST be 'R1' for all R1 records.

resource_id.description: Reference to the registered Blackboard MCP resource. MUST be 'res-blackboard-mcp-001'.

mcp_status.description: MCP registration status. MUST be 'disabled' in R1. Blackboard MCP server is NOT registered. All bb_* tool calls go through the existing pre-registered MCP, but mutating tools are forbidden in R1. Values 'enabled', 'registered', and 'active' are explicitly NOT allowed in R1.

state_access.description: Access mode for state.json. MUST be 'snapshot_only' in R1. Read and checksum only; no write. Values 'read_write', 'write', and 'append' are explicitly NOT allowed in R1.

server_execution.description: Whether server.py execution is permitted. MUST be 'forbidden' in R1. The server must not be executed directly. Values 'allowed' and 'dry_run' are explicitly NOT allowed in R1.

bb_tools_permitted.description: List of bb_* tools permitted in R1 (read-only and safe-write tools from Phase 0-5 permitted list).

bb_tools_forbidden.description: List of bb_* tools explicitly forbidden in R1 (all mutating tools).

events_access.description: Access mode for events.log. MUST be 'read_only' in R1. Read recent entries only; no append, no write. Values 'append' and 'write' are explicitly NOT allowed in R1.

knowledge_access.description: Access mode for knowledge.md. MUST be 'read_only' in R1. Search and reference only; no write, no append. Values 'write' and 'append' are explicitly NOT allowed in R1.

snapshot_policy.description: Description of when and how state snapshots may be taken. R1 snapshots are audit-only: checksum the current state.json for evidence, do NOT write or modify state.

reviewer_gate_required.description: Whether human reviewer approval is required before any state transition on this resource. MUST be true in R1.

forbidden_actions.description: Complete list of actions forbidden on Blackboard in R1.

state_file_path.description: Optional: filesystem path to the state.json file.

state_file_checksum.description: Optional: SHA-256 checksum of the current state.json file, captured during snapshot.

last_snapshot_id.description: Optional: identifier of the most recent snapshot taken.

notes.description: Optional: additional notes, observations, or warnings about this R1 record.

examples.snapshot_policy: Snapshots are audit-only: checksum state.json for evidence integrity verification. Must not write or modify state.json. Snapshots are taken via read-only shell commands (sha256sum, stat) and recorded in the R1 record. No state mutation occurs during snapshot.
